caption: A man is recorded in a podcast setting, wearing a white button-down shirt with brown suspenders, a patterned bow tie, glasses, and a grey, peaked wig. He wears black over-ear headphones and speaks into a professional microphone positioned in front of him. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and a display of clothing on mannequins, including a garment with "LEE" printed on it. On-screen graphics appear in the lower portions of the frame, including a logo that reads "THE TALK PODCAST" on the left and "BOSS TALK JOY" on the right. As the sequence progresses, the man remains in a similar profile position, shifting his head and facial expression slightly while speaking. The lighting remains constant, and the camera remains stationary, focusing on his upper body as he engages in the conversation.
